title: Malty Snappy Venezuelan Chocolate Chips Empanadas
description: A lazy Sunday treat featuring malty and snappy Venezuelan empanadas with chocolate chips, made with a laminated puff pastry and served on a tagliere, this dish is Jain-friendly and perfect for a dessert or snack
instructions: Make puff pastry by combining flour and malt powder in a bowl
Add cold butter to flour mixture and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour until it resembles coarse crumbs
Gradually add ice water to the mixture and stir until it forms a shaggy dough
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead a few times until it becomes smooth and pliable
Roll out dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass
Place a few chocolate chips in the center of each dough circle
Fold dough over chocolate chips to form a half moon shape and press edges together to seal
Brush tops of empanadas with egg replacement and sprinkle with confectioners sugar
Place empanadas on a tagliere and bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown
